description: An SEO specialist wants to update the meta titles for all product pages to a new, standardized format.

nodes.task_description: Define the new meta title format (e.g., '[Product Name] | [Category] | [Brand Name]').

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a clear template for the new titles.

nodes.task_description: Pull a list of all product pages with their current titles, names, and categories.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of all products needing an update.

nodes.task_description: Run a script to programmatically generate the new titles based on the template and apply the changes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates all product page titles to the new format.
